events.text: Diagnosis written to `/app/answer.json`. Given the clip captures only the aftermath and there's no trend log, load reading, or repeat test, the intermittent report can't be distinguished from normal thermostatic cycling under NEC 427 — I flagged this as `needs_more_info` (medium risk) with specific follow-up actions (pull controller trend data, run a witnessed repeat test with load/temperature readings, check GFEP trip history) rather than passing or failing outright.
